LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RICKEY SCOTT NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM CLAIMS PRESENTATION REQUIREMENT (GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION IS DENIED. NO EVIDENCE PRESENTED THAT PLAINTIFF WAS PHYSICALLY OR MENTALLY INCAPACITATED DURING THE TIME SPECIFIED IN GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 911.2 AND BY REASON OF THAT DISABILITY FAILED TO PRESENT A CLAIM DURING THAT TIME. GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 946.6. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing On Peititon For Relief From Cliams Presentation Requirement (Govt Code 946.6)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RICKEY SCOTT Notice of Hearing on Petition for Relief from Claims Presentation Requirement (Government Code 946.6). No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition is denied. No evidence presented that plaintiff was physically or mentally incapacitated during the time specified in Government Code section 911.2 and by reason of that disability failed to present a claim during that time. Government Code section 946.6. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing On Peititon For Relief From Cliams Presentation Requirement (Govt Code 946.6)
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Continued To Jun-09-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF RICKEY SCOTT'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM CLAIMS PRESENTATION REQUIREMENT (GOVT CODE 946.6) is continued to June 9, 2010. Moving party to provide courtesy copies with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797
